mapper.sql: r.id, r.user_id AS userId, r.food_id AS foodId, f.food_name AS foodName, r.diet_date AS dietDate, r.meal_type AS mealType, r.intake_grams AS intakeGrams, r.calories_intake AS caloriesIntake, r.is_recommended AS isRecommended, r.remark, r.created_at AS createdAt
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_diet_record ( user_id, food_id, diet_date, meal_type, intake_grams, calories_intake, is_recommended, remark ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{foodId}, #{dietDate}, #{mealType}, #{intakeGrams}, #{caloriesIntake}, #{isRecommended}, #{remark} )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user_diet_record WHERE user_id IS NOT NULL AND food_id IS NOT NULL
